trigger: V_quad fails to recover P-III(D_6) at >= 20 digits
diagnosis: The CC-channel as proposed in CHANNEL-THEORY-OUTLINE Sec 3.3 is operationalised in this session via Domb-Sykes ratio analysis on the trans-series h_k extracted by LSQ fit of log|delta_n| (the BoT-channel object). This approach FAILS for V_quad: |h_k|^(1/k) does not converge to 2/sqrt(3) (literature Borel singularity); high-k h_k are LSQ-noise-corrupted at every accessible (depth, dps, K) tier (T1: 240/4000/22, T2: 360/6000/32). Best digits-of-agreement on xi_0 = -0.497.
structural_finding: The literature xi_0 = 2/sqrt(3) lives in a DIFFERENT formal series (Gevrey-1 solution at z=0 of the linear ODE associated to f(z) = sum Q_n z^n, equivalently the Birkhoff-factored asymptotic series at n=infinity of the V_quad linear difference operator), NOT in the trans-series 1/n-expansion of log|delta_n|. This sharpens CHANNEL-THEORY-OUTLINE Definition 1: BoT and CC are distinct in their formal-series space D, not just in their section S.
user_call_required: (a) invest a separate session in a Newton-polygon / Birkhoff formal-solution extractor for the linear difference operator, OR (b) accept CC-channel as a structural definition with V_quad's literature datum (Papanokechi2026Vquad) as the only known instance, and proceed to Zenodo posting of CHANNEL-THEORY-OUTLINE without a numerical CC-pipeline anchor for the other five families.
user_response_2026-05-01: Continue diagnostic: run QL15/QL26 probe + finalise deliverables, label as scope-limited diagnostic, document HALT.
phase_5_consequence: QL15/QL26 probe output is diagnostic only -- the same BoT->CC repurposing blocker applies. Phase-5 was nonetheless useful: it (i) reproduced the BOREL-CHANNEL-K-SCAN WKB closed-form to 28-29 digits for QL15/QL26 (extends published 13-15 digits), (ii) found NO P-III(D6) ratio signature (beta/xi = -1/6) at >= 15 digits, so K-SCAN Variant-A 'BOTH ARTEFACT' verdict STANDS.
